description: SQL injection vulnerability in the Yet another Newsletter Component (aka YaNC or com_yanc) component before 1.5 beta 3 for Mambo and Joomla! allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary SQL commands via the listid parameter to index.php. NOTE: some of these details are obtained from third party information.
